name: M1S80W

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: A6992114-C59D-413E-BED1-89EF066FF230

comment: M1S80W is a budget friendly, zoomable, and compact moving spotlight, making it a perfect fit for various venues and corporate events with its compact form factors M1S80W delivers remarkable flexibility  with its manual zoom, which ranges from 12° to 18°. The 80W white LED source produces a surprising 1,826 lumen fixture output.

gwSpecs.description: M1S80W is a budget friendly, zoomable, and compact moving spotlight, making it a perfect fit for various venues and corporate events with its compact form factors M1S80W delivers remarkable flexibility  with its manual zoom, which ranges from 12° to 18°. The 80W white LED source produces a surprising 1,826 lumen fixture output.
